title: FEMA Disaster Assistance Legislation
description: Legislation aimed at modifying FEMA's disaster assistance programs. S. 5067 would change the Individuals and Households Program to help households after a disaster. H.R. 744 allows states and local governments to repurpose unused funds for administrative capacity. H.R. 1678 amends the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act.
